category_sources: source_facts.description says sshfs is a file system client based on SSH File Transfer Protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives sshfs; source_facts.repo is the official libfuse SSHFS project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official repository README, the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/libfuse/sshfs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SFTP and filesystem-client functionality; source_facts.executables lists sshfs mount commands.
